query_title: Berserk: The Golden Age Arc I - The Egg of the King

recommendations.title: Berserk: The Golden Age Arc III - The Advent
recommendations.overview: One year has passed since Guts left the Band of the Hawk and Griffith was imprisoned by the Kingdom of Midland for treason. In the dead of night, at a camping site where they hide, the Band of the Hawk is attacked by Bakiraka assassins led by Silat.

recommendations.title: Berserk: The Golden Age Arc II - The Battle for Doldrey
recommendations.overview: The Band of the Hawk and their enigmatic leader Griffith continue winning battle after battle as their prestige throughout the kingdom of Midland grows. But their latest task is one that has seen failure from everyone who has attempted it: the subjug

recommendations.title: The Musketeers of Pig Alley
recommendations.overview: A man recognizes the thief who had previously robbed him as one of the men involved in an unrelated mob shootout.

recommendations.title: Guillermo del Toro's Pinocchio
recommendations.overview: During the rise of fascism in Mussolini's Italy, a wooden boy brought magically to life struggles to live up to his father's expectations.

recommendations.title: Intolerance: Love's Struggle Throughout the Ages
recommendations.overview: The story of a poor young woman, separated by prejudice from her husband and baby, is interwoven with tales of intolerance from throughout history.

recommendations.title: Way Down East
recommendations.overview: A naive country girl is tricked into a sham marriage by a wealthy womanizer, then must rebuild her life despite the taint of having borne a child out of wedlock.

recommendations.title: Broken Blossoms or The Yellow Man and the Girl
recommendations.overview: The love story of an abused English girl and a Chinese Buddhist in a time when London was a brutal and harsh place to live.

recommendations.title: Batman: Gotham Knight
recommendations.overview: Six interlocking stories reveal Bruce Wayne's earliest adventures as Batman and the steps he took to become the grim avenger of Gotham City.
recommendations.director: Yoshiaki Kawajiri, Toshiyuki Kubooka, Jong-Sik Nam, Yasuhiro Aoki, Futoshi Higashide, Shojiro Nishimi, Hiroshi Morioka

recommendations.title: Armour of God

recommendations.title: Green Snake
recommendations.overview: While trying to free her sister from Fahai's clutches, Xiao Qing winds up in a dystopian city and meets a mysterious man who can't recall his past life.
